result.stdout:
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║         OpenAPI C# Client Generator                          ║
╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

OpenAPI C# Client Generator

Usage: dotnet run -- [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <path>       Path to OpenAPI spec file (default: swagger.json)
  -o, --output <path>      Output directory (default: ./Generated)
  -n, --namespace <name>   Namespace for generated code (default: GeneratedApi)
  --no-auth                Skip authentication handler generation
  --no-retry               Skip retry policy generation
  --no-logging             Skip logging infrastructure
  --no-readme              Skip README.md generation
  --no-validation          Skip validation attributes
  -h, --help               Show this help message

Example:
  dotnet run -- -i swagger.json -o ./Generated -n MyApp.ApiClient
